name: @beamhop/invite-link
description: Encode and decode beamhop session join links — pure functions, no I/O.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format esm --sourcemap && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].cjs' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
